headline: Clear calendar and quiet comms — ideal day to make real progress on the 'no ground truth' evals design doc (AE-1079), your only active ticket.

quick_wins.task: Fix Salesforce and Snowflake credentials so dashboards are available for next week
quick_wins.why: Both integrations are broken (auth failures); you're flying blind on escalations and product metrics

must_make_progress.task: Draft or significantly advance the 'Generated evaluations - clarify no ground truth' design doc (AE-1079)
must_make_progress.why: It's your sole active Jira story, no due date yet which means it could slip silently; evals are a key 26.4 deliverable per OKRs and directly supports the Agents Big Rock

must_make_progress.task: Review the latest Agents bi-weekly TR page and align your evals work with stated key deliverables
must_make_progress.why: OKR page lists evals as a demo/deliverable area; ensures your design doc addresses what leadership expects

must_communicate_with.about: Align on 'no ground truth' evaluation approach — get their input before finalizing design doc
Salesforce and Snowflake credential failures — request credential reset or token refresh

agents_in_production.vs_goal: Snowflake auth broken — fix credentials to restore visibility

flags: Salesforce integration is down (INVALID_LOGIN) — you have zero visibility into customer escalations. Fix urgently.
Snowflake metrics pipeline is down (empty password) — product telemetry and MBR dashboard data inaccessible.
AE-1079 has no due date set — risk of it drifting; consider setting a target date today.
Autopilot is flagged Risk Yellow in OKRs — monitor for spillover impact on your evals work.

outcomes.business_impact: No escalations visible due to broken Salesforce auth — restoring access is the top prerequisite for business-facing impact today.
outcomes.product_adoption: Evals adoption metrics unavailable; advancing the no-ground-truth design doc (AE-1079) is the most impactful adoption-driving work available today as it unblocks the evals feature set for 26.4.

slack_summary: Quiet day with zero meetings and no inbound messages — best use of time is deep work on AE-1079 (no-ground-truth evals design doc), your only active Jira ticket and a key 26.4 deliverable. Urgent housekeeping: Salesforce and Snowflake creds are both broken, leaving you blind on escalations and metrics — flag IT today. No meetings on the calendar.
